reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Volvo Wallbox
reauth_confirm.description: The Volvo Wallbox integration needs to re-authenticate your account.

api_key.title: Enter your API key
api_key.description: Get your API key from the [Volvo developers portal]({volvo_dev_portal}).

wallbox_id.title: Enter your wallbox ID
wallbox_id.description: The ID of your wallbox (for example its serial number). It is validated against the Volvo API, so if one candidate fails, try another.

error.invalid_api_key: The API key is not valid for the Energy Device API. Also verify that the SCOPES list in const.py matches the scopes on the developer portal.
error.invalid_wallbox_id: No wallbox found with this ID. Try another value (serial number, PNC, ...).

abort.already_in_progress: Configuration flow is already in progress.
abort.missing_configuration: The component is not configured. Please follow the documentation.
abort.oauth_unauthorized: OAuth authorization error while obtaining access token.
abort.unique_id_mismatch: The authenticated account does not match the configured wallbox.

start_charging.name: Start charging
start_charging.description: Starts charging, optionally on behalf of an RFID ID token.

id_token.name: ID token
id_token.description: Optional RFID ID token to start the session with.

apply_charging_schedule.name: Apply charging schedule
apply_charging_schedule.description: Applies a transactional charging schedule to the wallbox.

periods.name: Periods
periods.description: List of periods, each with type (watt or ampere), value and duration (HH:MM:SS).

get_charging_sessions.name: Get charging sessions
get_charging_sessions.description: Returns charging sessions in a time range.

read_id_token.name: Read ID token
read_id_token.description: Puts the wallbox in RFID read mode to learn a new token.

add_id_token.name: Add ID token
add_id_token.description: Registers a new RFID ID token on your account.

update_id_token.name: Update ID token
update_id_token.description: Renames an existing RFID ID token.

delete_id_token.name: Delete ID token
delete_id_token.description: Removes an RFID ID token from your account.

token.name: Token
token.description: The RFID token value to delete.

api_error.message: Communication with the Volvo API failed: {message}

device_not_found.message: No Volvo Wallbox found for the given device.

entry_not_loaded.message: The Volvo Wallbox config entry is not loaded.
